## Pre-Merge Checklist (Developer)

- [ ] **Branch is up-to-date with main**
  - Ran: `git rebase origin/main` (if behind)
  - No merge conflicts
  
- [ ] **No duplicate work**
  - Checked open PRs for overlapping functionality
  - Did not start a duplicate of existing PR
  
- [ ] **Tests passing**
  - Unit tests: ✅
  - Integration tests: ✅
  - CI pipeline: ✅
  
- [ ] **Code quality**
  - Ran `make check` locally
  - No new warnings/errors
  
- [ ] **Documentation**
  - Updated README if new feature
  - Updated arc42 if architecture changed
  - Added/updated code comments where needed
